reviews.text: Yesterday i buat scalling gigi with Dr Nisa . I ada trauma masa i sekolah rendah time checkup i kne cabut 2 gigi one shot terus. So i dah trauma i jadi takut nak jumpa any dentist and skrg i try berani kan diri utk cuba and sebenarnya tak sakit pun maybe sbb dr nisa juga dia very gentle dan i ikutkan cerewet juga tapi dia akan bagitahu i part mana yang nyilu part mana yg ok. Itu yang i suka dan i rasa tak takut utk cuba sekali lagi . Harga pun affordable mampu milik. Thankyou ❤️ Staff sana pun very friendly and helpful. Next maybe boleh bawak husband and anak sekali hehe.
reviews.textTranslated: Yesterday I did a dental scaling with Dr. Nisa. I had a trauma when I was in elementary school during a checkup, I had 2 teeth pulled out in one shot. So I was traumatized and became afraid to see any dentist and now I'm trying to dare myself to try and it actually doesn't hurt, maybe because Dr. Nisa is also very gentle and I agree, she's also chatty, but she will tell me which part hurts and which part is ok. That's what I like and I don't feel afraid to try it again. The price is also affordable. Thank you ❤️ The staff there is also very friendly and helpful. Next time maybe I can bring my husband and children, hehe.

reviews.name: Farrash Hasbollah
reviews.text:
I came to this clinic on a friend's recommendation and couldn't be happier with my experience. I was initially sceptical about the parking situation in the area, but it was actually quite easy to find a spot nearby.

Dr. Nisa is one of the gentlest dentists I've ever visited. She is incredibly kind, reassuring, and made me feel comfortable throughout the entire appointment. I also appreciated that she only recommended what was necessary and explained the best treatment options without any pressure.

The prices are very affordable, and the quality of care is excellent. I'll definitely be returning to Dr. Nisa for all my future dental procedures. Highly recommended!

reviews.name: Shereene Dutton
reviews.text: Dr Nisa is one of the gentlest and sweetest dentists I’ve ever met. She’s very professional, explains everything clearly, and always makes me feel comfortable during appointments. I’ve recommended her to so many of my friends because she genuinely cares about her patients and doesn’t overcharge. Highly recommend if you’re looking for a trustworthy dentist!

reviews.text:
Had a pleasant experience in this clinic as i did my braces here . I had a great experience from start to finish with Dr Nisa & the team since it was my first time doing braces & also cabut gigi. They were very friendly indeed.

To Dr Nisa , thankyou for being a great dentist. She explained everything clearly and always make sure i was comfortable and kept the whole process smooth & easy. She was so gentle & absolutely gorgeous in person 💛. I hope she’s will be my dentist along my braces journey 🙆🏻‍♀️

To the staff , thankyou for being a friendly assistant throughout the process 🫶🏻

Btw this clinic is very clean & comfortable. While waiting for your turn , they played some songs that you will sing along hehe , so that you wont be bored.

For anyone yg baru nak start braces , I recommend this clinic as the whole team sangat membantu throughout the process. They explain to you from A to Z clearly.

More clinic visits to come hehe 🫶🏻

reviews.text: First visit to Eve’s Dental Clinic and it was a pleasant experience. I went for scaling, and the doctor was very gentle and careful throughout. She explained everything clearly, including the charges, and made sure I was comfortable the whole time. Will definitely come back.

reviews.name: Kira
reviews.text: Wanted to try this dental clinic after reading a lot of amazing reviews about this place. I even brought my siblings along. So glad I did because Dr. Evelyn was very thorough about her dental knowledge. I considered doing just scaling, polishing and whitening and also to consult with her about composite bonding. But she didn’t recommend composite bonding if I wouldn’t mind post maintenance treatment which could rack up thousands of ringgit. She instead suggested a short term braces (due to my minor teeth gap, the gap could be easily closed within 1 - 2 months) at almost the same cost of doing composite bonding. If I don’t like wearing braces and have low pain tolerance, then she suggested using a clear aligner which would cost me a lot more but at a much reduced time and also, more aesthetically pleasing. There was no hard sell, but rather a genuine suggestion based on my current budget. I appreciate honest people like her. Super friendly and very attentive to your needs. I felt close to no paint (only a slight pain on my front teeth due to sensitivity). Highly highly recommended dentist!

reviews.name: Delma D'Silva
reviews.text:
I attended this dental surgery in Petaling Jaya (Malaysia) recently and had a very positive experience.

By way of background, I completed dental treatment with braces at a dental clinic in Melbourne. Unfortunately following that treatment my top and bottom molars were
so misaligned that I was unable to chew food. My Melbourne dentist advised that this problem could be corrected by fitting porcelain veneers. Due to the cost of porcelain veneers in Australia, I decided to travel to Malaysia for the veneers.

At Utama Dental Clinic I was seen by Dr Ahmed who informed me that veneers are really fitted for aesthetic reasons.  Notwithstanding Dr Ahmed agreed to assist me to resolve my difficulties with chewing. In andd to fitting veneers. Over three separate appointments he and his staff undertook a series of procedures which included scaling and grinding my teeth before the veneers were fitted. I am so pleased and happy with the work done by Dr Ahmed and his team of warm, friendly and approachable staff, not to mention his technician who hand crafted the veneers. I wish to share my heartfelt thanks to each of you for your professional and friendly approach to patient care. A shout out to Ramlah, the office manager who is friendly and approachable.

I am pleased to recommend Dr Ahmed and his team to anybody looking for a skilled and positive experience for any type of dental work.

reviews.responseFromOwnerText: Thank you for your kind words and for placing your trust in us. We’re delighted to hear that your implant journey with Dr. Ahmad. Your recommendation truly means a lot to us. We look forward to continuing to care for your dental health.

reviews.text: I first came here in 2013 for dental work and wasn’t sure what to expect, but I was pleasantly surprised. Dr. Ahmed and his team were highly professional, and the quality of his work was exceptional. I’ve had a bridge done, and my partner has had implants—both with excellent results and no issues at all.We’ve been very impressed with the level of care, attention to detail, and professionalism throughout. I would highly recommend this dental clinic to anyone.
reviews.responseFromOwnerText: Thank you so much for your kind words and for being part of our family for many years. Your trust and support over the years truly mean the world to us. We’re delighted to hear that both your treatment and your partner’s have been such positive experiences. Dr. Ahmed and the entire team deeply appreciate your continued confidence and recommendation—we look forward to caring for you both for many more years to come.

reviews.name: Filo DIYer
reviews.text:
The team from Utama Dental was excellent who was lead by Dr Ahmed who looked after me. I was recommended by a close friend in Australia who had been coming here for many years with great results.

I decided to get two implants for myself and had no problems at all. During the process, I learnt more about my teeth from Dr Ahmed in that short time than years spent with my dentist in Australia. I don’t do much reviews but my positive experience with this dentist deserves one. I will be back with others in the near future to get more work done on my teeth. Hands down, value for money compared to getting it done in Australia but most importantly, QUALITY. Will give it six stars out of five with two thumbs up. Manny T
reviews.responseFromOwnerText:
Dear Manny, thank you so much for your wonderful and detailed feedback. We’re truly honoured that you chose us based on your friend’s recommendation all the way from Australia. It’s great to hear that your implant journey with Dr. Ahmed was smooth and that you found the experience both informative and positive.

Your kind words about our quality of care and value mean a lot to the entire team. We truly appreciate you taking the time to share your experience, especially as someone who doesn’t usually leave reviews. We look forward to welcoming you back and taking care of you and your friends in the near future.

My 6-year-old has been seeing Dr. Nolan for his dental care, and he has always been comfortable during his visits. Dr. Nolan previously fitted him with 2 metal crowns, and more recently extracted 2 other decayed teeth.

reviews.name: Sam of KL
reviews.text:
NOT recommended if you are considering Invisalign.

Went there for a Invisalign. The female dentist was very unprofessional, instead of explain all the unknowns to me as the patient who is paying over RM10,000 for a Invisalign, she just kept asking me to read the menu or look up the internet for answers.

At the finishing phase of the Invisalign, instead of giving me the Invisalign that needs to be ordered from overseas, they charge me extra to make one retainer from them.
and the retainer broke in less than a week.
Keep in mind I still wore it with care yet still, the broke and now my teeth gap are slowly reappearing again.

They seem to be in business for many years, I am guessing this side of the business principle is very inexperience and many other small things I won't bother mentioning such as Dentist is always late, the reception never have a clue about what is going on.

Keep this in mind if you are considering any big treatment here. I do not recommend it personally.

reviews.text: If you’re afraid of pain or have dental phobia, she’s truly the gentlest dentist I’ve ever met. reviews.text: I had a wonderful experience at this clinic! I went in for a tooth-colored filling and scaling & polishing, and I couldn't be happier with the results. Dr. Chia and her assistant Nan were incredibly kind and professional, making sure I felt comfortable throughout the entire process. The environment is very cozy and relaxing, which really helps if you're nervous about dental visits. As a lovely bonus, they gave me plenty of toothpaste samples (while stock last)—the perfect size for my upcoming travels! Highly recommend this team.
reviews.responseFromOwnerText:
Thank you so much for your kind words and for taking the time to leave this lovely review 💛
I’m really happy to hear that you had a comfortable and pleasant experience with us, and that you’re satisfied with the filling as well as the scaling & polishing. It truly means a lot to Nan and me.

Wishing you all the best moving forward, and do remember to wear your retainer diligently after your braces treatment so we can keep that beautiful smile stable for years to come 😊
If you ever have any questions or need anything, we’re always here to help. Safe travels and hope to see you again!

Dr Chia

reviews.text: Came here for scaling and new retainers. Dr Chia and Dr Tan were very friendly and helpful, will definitely return in the future. Thank you!

reviews.name: Gwen Tey
reviews.text:
I was searching for a dentist to fix my post braces teeth alignment as I was not happy with the shifting, and I’ve found Dr Chia via online reviews.

She is really professional with over 15 years of experience in dentistry, and she recommended me to fix my teeth alignment with aligners.

We all know the pain we have with dentist appointments but it is never the case with Dr Chia. I always look forward to my monthly visit with her and her friendly nurse.

I’m now in my 8th set of Angel Aligner treatment by Dr Chia and I’m so happy with the results! I’m getting more and more confident now, thank you Dr! :)
reviews.responseFromOwnerText:
Thank you so much for your sweet review! It honestly made my day. 😊
I still remember your early visits — you were so frustrated trying to remove the aligners and even a bit sad you couldn’t do your manicure. Fast forward to now… you’re a pro at insertion and removal and your nails look great again! 

My nurse is always extra happy when she sees a leng lui walking in — she’ll miss you once your aligner journey ends, and honestly, so will I. Please still drop by and say hi even after treatment is done!

See you at the next visit!
— Dr Chia

reviews.name: Welson Goh

reviews.responseFromOwnerText:

Wishing you a smooth healing and healthy teeth ahead!
— Dr Chia

reviews.text: The Clinic is not modern type yet his expertise is highly recommended. Both doctor and nurses are friendly and accommodating

reviews.name: yean nee lee
reviews.text:
I have been with Dr. Lee for 36 months and i believe my journey will end soon. The problem that i have will be open bite, tongue thrust, gums disease (that can't be cure, only not to make the situation worst) and some other complication that my tooth is having.

Frankly, after so long with Dr. Lee, I realised that he is the "I - introvert" guy with good knowledge about biting. In the past, i have always failed to understand him in term of his expectation to have a good bites, vs me having a good and beautiful appearance is much important (at that point of time) for having the braces.

With my ignorant, i feel blessed that i have continued undergoing the whole procedure with him as for me "trust the expert" is the mindset that i always have. FYI, as i do not wish to go for jaw surgery eventhough Dr. Lee did suggest so.

I have chosen Dr. Lee because in term of his education background (which he had his earlier orthodontist studied in UK, followed by practices) during the old days which i have put extremely high value to this.

For my case, I am buying a service of intelligence, rather than going for artificial intelligence whereby his clinic is a traditional clinic and don't expect fancy equipments, but his expertise is what i go for.

Trust him and he will deliver. I believe having a good bite and good oral health are vital for everyone's well-being. Hence, there I go continuing my journey with him and looking forward to a better me.

reviews.name: Elyse Twee
reviews.text: Been under Dr Lee and his nurses' care for the past 8 years, and appreciate that he works quickly. I only need to express my needs and he attends to it immediately, often providing solution till I am satisfied with the outlook of my teeth. Direct and straight to the point!

reviews.name: J C
reviews.text: Dr Lee is a very experienced orthodontist who is very skillful, and also provides general dental check-ups by-the-by. He doesn’t recommend unnecessary treatments or tests and doesn’t force his views. For eg, 4 perfectly good teeth will usually need to be extracted when undergoing braces treatment. However I was able to save the 4 teeth as I can accept teeth that are not textbook perfectly aligned and yet, they already look really good! In addition, his prices are very reasonable. Where else can you get your teeth scaled for RM120 by a dental specialist when even regular dentists are charging about RM160-RM170? Overall, he is a down-to-earth and frank dentist who is very skilled in his trade. I would recommend his services.

reviews.name: Thila Camillo
reviews.text:
Dr. Lee has been my orthodontist for years, since high school! Very pleased with his work as it served me well even while I was abroad. I recently went for my follow up appointment after 7 years and thanks to his amazing work with my permanent retainers, my teeth and bite has maintained all these years.

The receptionist and dental assistants are always so courteous and friendly! A+

If you’re expecting a fancy orthodontist office, this may not be it but the quality of work Dr. Lee and his staff has put into, is worth it. I was able to achieve my beautiful smile in less than 2 years.

Dr. Lee is also very smart with his time. Despite attending to multiple patients at time, he manages to cater very specifically to each patient.

I recommend booking an earlier appointment to avoid long wait times. Typically, longer wait times are expected when it comes to any type of medical or dental appointments so do manage your expectations.

I refuse to see any other orthodontist. Thanks Dr. Lee and staff! Keep up the outstanding work! You’ve made me one happy and loyal patient! Wishing you continued success.

reviews.name: Claudio Abbate
reviews.text:
I was worried to do XRays with my kid because of the radiation but it was apparently necessary. The doctor referred us there cannot not even use this xrays as the are just white and blurry. So I exposed my kid to radiation for nothing. Snd since the nurses praising him so much for not moving at all, it's clearly their fault.

What I also worth to mention, when we were on the waiting room the doctor came without introducing himself and started all of a sudden to touch the mouth of my kid as if wanted to buy a horse and his fingernails were dirty like the ones from a car mechanic...

Just, don't go there at all!! This is a complete substandard. Doesn't matter how much experience is there. I can't feel any...

reviews.text: Dr Sara is very kind and concerned for the welfare of his patients. He does not conduct unnecessary processes in order to gain extra cash, but provides the best treatment method based on your condition. I had a molar eruption lately and it was recommended by others that I request for gum cutting in order not to inhibit teeth growth. However, upon examining my tooth, Dr Sara decided to treat it conservatively, and within a day my gum swelling went down by 90%, and the pain was almost gone. Highly recommend to consult Dr Sara for any tooth related problems.
reviews.responseFromOwnerText: Thank you , young patient. We appreciate and provide the best. I am an old timer, generally prefer more conservative approach, with gradual improvement. reviews.name: XY Chong
reviews.text:
I’ve been terrified of visiting the dentist ever since I was a kid, but Dr. Eileen completely changed that for me. She was so gentle, patient, and attentive throughout the whole procedure, and kept checking in to make sure I was comfortable.

My filling was quite a complex one, so I had to keep my mouth open for a long time. Even so, I felt much less discomfort than I have at some other dental clinics in the past. Dr. Eileen’s skill and caring approach really made a huge difference. Bravo to her assistant too, who was equally patient!

A big thank you to Dr. Eileen and the entire team for being so professional, friendly, and welcoming. They turned what used to be a stressful experience into a surprisingly comfortable one. Highly recommended! ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐
reviews.responseFromOwnerText:
Hi XY Chong,

Thank you so much for your kind words and for sharing your experience with us.
Knowing that you've been terrified of dental visits since childhood makes your review especially meaningful to us. We're truly happy that Dr. Eileen was able to help make your visit a more comfortable and positive one. Taking the time to listen, check in, and ensure our patients feel at ease is something we believe is just as important as the treatment itself.

We're also glad that despite the complexity of the filling, you felt comfortable throughout the procedure. Your compliments to Dr. Eileen and our assistant mean a lot, and we'll be sure to share your lovely feedback with them.

Thank you for placing your trust in us and for recommending our clinic. It was a pleasure caring for you, and we look forward to seeing you again at your next visit.

Take care and keep smiling! 😁

reviews.name: John Luk
reviews.responseFromOwnerText: Thank you so much for your 5-star rating, John! 🌟 We truly appreciate your support and are glad to know you had a positive experience with us at Jaya Dental Surgery. We look forward to seeing you again at your next visit!

reviews.text: I’ve been a patient here since I was 4 years old, and I wouldn't go anywhere else. The service is consistently excellent, and they always prioritise patient comfort. They have the ability to balance the essential dental needs with what the patient actually wants. Absolute professionals.
reviews.responseFromOwnerText:
Hi AO,

Thank you so much for your kind words and for trusting us with your dental care since you were 4 years old — it truly means a lot to us. 🥹

We’re incredibly grateful to have been part of your dental journey over the years. Providing comfortable, personalised care while balancing what our patients need and want has always been our priority.

Your trust and continued support inspire us to keep doing our best. We look forward to caring for your smile for many more years to come! 😊🦷

Jaya Dental Management

reviews.name: Jo Too
reviews.text: Fixed my teeth :D

reviews.name: Max Lim
reviews.text: I took my sister here for her 1/2 yearly check up. Doctor Ng has been our family dentist for many years. He is very professional n thorough. He checked n cleaned my sister's teeth. For her there's no new cavity for any fillings to be done. There's no decay too. So her scaling only cost her RM 150 only. Many years ago it only cost RM90-RM 95. Then as years go by , it slowly increased to RM 100- RM 150. Is this due to inflation in Malaysia?

reviews.name: Bee Leng Leong
reviews.text: This morning I went to this clinic in uptown for my half yearly dental check up with Doctor Ng , my family dentist for more than 10 years. He’s patient n when he extracts your tooth, he can do so without much pain. He will also show you the extracted tooth n jokingly ask you whether you want to keep . He checked n cleaned my teeth . After that he X- rayed my molar n discovered that I needed to fill up 4 molars for me. He showed me the X- ray. Then he started doing the needful for me. He then advised me not to eat for an hour. Then only eat something soft n not to bite or chew any hard foodstuff. This will protect the fillings better n longer. So I came back n ate taufufah which I bought from the shop on my way home. Luckily my 4 molars could be saved in time cos I never like using dentures.

reviews.name: CL Hor
reviews.text: An honest dentist, no nonsense, no up selling. Tells u your options, pros and cons and the associated costs. No frills clinic, If u r looking for a fancy clinic w hot coffee and tea w a doctor who smooth talks to u, u will not get it here.  He is honest, doesn't sugar coat his explanations but always give u the best option and value.

Had a great experience at Sepa Dental. Dr. Samantha was very nice, professional, and helpful throughout the treatment.

They even provided hot tea as a welcoming drink, which was such a nice touch. With the relaxing ambience, it honestly feels more like a spa than a dental clinic!

reviews.responseFromOwnerText:
Thank you for taking the time to leave a review.

We take all feedback seriously and always strive to provide the best possible experience for our customers. However, after carefully reviewing our records, we have been unable to find any evidence of your visit or transaction with our establishment.

If you believe this review was intended for our business, we would appreciate it if you could contact us directly with details of your visit so that we can investigate further and address any concerns you may have. At this time, we are unable to verify your experience as a customer.

We are committed to transparency and excellent service, and we welcome genuine feedback from those who have visited us.

Thank you.

reviews.name: joanne chow
reviews.text:
My recent experience with Dr Laura Lau has been such a pleasant one. I find Dr Laura Lau to be very thorough and professional in her approach and assessment on the overall condition/problem of my teeth/gums. FYI my molar tooth cracked and fallen off with barely any of my original tooth left.  Dr Laura after assessing, takes her time to explain and discuss the kind of treatments she will do. She is also very meticulous and skilful in the execution of the treatment, be it….drilling, scaling, polishing, on lay and even laser off part of my gums throughout the process. The best part is there was minimal discomfort and pain!!! Very steady hands and sharp.

I went home pleased that I have come to the right doctor. She will be my to go to dentist from now on and for my family for sure.

I would recommend you to see Dr Laura Lau if you are as fussy as me and looking for a doctor for your dental care/health who is not only highly skilful but kind and patient to top it all!

Joanne
reviews.responseFromOwnerText: Thank you for the wonderful review! We’re so glad you had a great experience here. Your kind words mean a lot to us and motivate us to keep delivering the best care possible. We can’t wait to welcome you back soon! 🥰

✨ From Shy to Shining: A Journey of Confidence ✨
It has been an absolute pleasure witnessing this incredible transformation at Uptown Dental Surgery. Our patient, an expat residing right here in KL, first came to us feeling shy and hesitant to show her smile.

Before starting her braces journey, her teeth were sunken in, which often impacted her confidence during daily interactions. After completing her treatment, the change is about much more than just alignment—she is now someone who simply cannot stop smiling!.

As seen in the "Before & After" in, our goal is to provide:

Healthier Teeth: Ensuring a functional and strong bite.

Beautiful Smile: Creating the aesthetic balance our patients deserve.

Confident You: Moving from shy beginnings to a radiant presence.

Better Life: Enhancing quality of life through improved self-esteem.

Are you ready to unlock your most confident smile? Whether you are a local or part of our wonderful expat community, we are here to help.

She used to smile with hesitation, often hiding her teeth in photos.

After starting braces, her smile slowly began to change—step by step, her teeth aligned and her confidence grew with every adjustment.

Today, she smiles freely and naturally. It’s not just a straighter smile—it’s a happier, more confident her.

A smile is the prettiest thing you can wear! ✨ We love seeing our patients leave the clinic with a newfound sense of confidence. This transformation isn’t just about aesthetics; it’s about feeling great every time you look in the mirror.

I had a freak accident, fell with my face down on a walking path. Had quite a few chipped teeth and one came out completely in the frontal jaw. My teeth were badly damaged. I was referred to Dr. Diane Chai of Smile Partners.
Dr Chai was very professional, personal and patient taking time to explain the options and her recommended treatment. She was also very thorough yet gentle in the way she went about treating me. I so appreciate Dr. Diane going out of her way to make sure what was needed to be addressed and that it was done timely and well. The bridge and crowns done were a perfect fit and I appreciate her following up after each treatment. We highly recommend Dr. Diane!!

reviews.name: Viktor Emeljanov
reviews.text:
I had the pleasure of being treated by Alice, during my visit.

A bit about myself: I travel a lot and have been to dentists in Australia, Dubai, Germany, Thailand, and Malaysia. So, I’ve experienced a wide range of quality. To be honest, I didn’t have high expectations going in, but Alice absolutely exceeded them. Her professional dental cleaning was truly world-class.

She was incredibly diligent, skilled, and clearly a master in her field. I have veneers, which makes my teeth more sensitive, but she handled everything with such precision and care, something other dentists in places like Dubai and Germany couldn’t quite achieve. She simply nailed it.

I’m genuinely impressed. If I return to Kuala Lumpur, I’ll definitely come back to this clinic. I sincerely hope Alice will still be there, I’d love to be treated by her again. I wish her and her assistant all the very best, and I send my warmest regards to the entire clinic.
reviews.responseFromOwnerText:
Thank you so much for such an incredible review! 🌟
 It is a true honor to be compared to dental standards in Dubai, Germany, and beyond, and to come out on top. 
Dr. Alice is indeed a master of her craft, and she was particularly touched by your feedback regarding your veneers and sensitive care. 🦷 
We strive for world-class precision with every patient. We wish you safe travels on your journeys, and we truly hope to see you again the next time you are in Kuala Lumpur! ✈️🇲🇾

reviews.name: May Chiam
reviews.text:
我有一个困扰了很久的问题。

三年前，我总觉得自己的呼吸通道特别“空”，而且闻到的气味都特别浓烈。慢慢地，我开始闻到一些奇怪的臭味，有时像 longkang（沟渠）的味道，有时又像臭鸡蛋味。口气也变得很重，不管是漱口还是使用 Marvis 牙膏，都没有改善。

前几天本来只是陪儿子去做牙套，想着顺便洗个牙。在填写病历表时，我把自己长期有 sinus 的问题写了出来。

见到 Ryan 医生时，虽然我没有预约，但刚好他有空，也刚好成了我的贵人。他听完我的情况后，建议我先做扫描检查。报告出来后，他向我详细解释问题所在，并建议进行 OAF Repair 手术。

他刷新了我对 sinus 的认知。我一直以为 sinus 问题是跟“鼻子”有关，从来没有想过竟然会跟“牙齿”有关。当时的我其实很惊讶，但看着他专业而细心的分析，我选择相信他。

隔天由 Benjie 医生主刀。他的专业和丰富知识让我信心大增。整个手术过程比我想象中轻松许多，不但没有太大的痛苦，而且他的动作快、准、稳，让人非常安心。

手术后我一直感觉良好。几天过去，我明显感觉那个“空洞感”已经消失了，鼻腔里的臭味也淡了许多。

今天回诊拆线时，帅气的 Benjie 医生告诉我，我长期困扰的鼻炎情况已经改善了！听到那一刻真的很开心，也更加庆幸自己当初选择相信 Ryan 医生的判断，并接受治疗。短短几天的改变，让我重新感受到正常呼吸的舒服和自在。

感恩遇到 Ryan 和 Benjie 医生，感谢他们的专业、耐心和帮助，让我终于找到问题的根源，也重新找回舒服自在的呼吸感觉。🙏❤️

最后想分享一下，Clarity Dental Clinic 其实是我在 Google 上偶然找到的。坦白说，价格确实不算便宜，但经过这次治疗后，我觉得他们的专业、细心和服务绝对对得起这个价钱。能够真正找出问题并解决多年困扰，对我来说是非常值得的。❤️
reviews.textTranslated:
I had a problem that had bothered me for a long time.

Three years ago, I always felt like my airways were particularly "empty," and the odors I smelled were extremely strong. Gradually, I started to smell strange, foul odors, sometimes like longkang (ditch), sometimes like rotten eggs. My breath also became very bad, and neither rinsing my mouth nor using Marvis toothpaste helped.

A few days ago, I was just accompanying my son to get braces and thought I'd get my teeth cleaned at the same time. While filling out the medical record, I wrote down my long-term sinus problem.

When I saw Dr. Ryan, although I didn't have an appointment, he happened to be available, which was a stroke of luck. After listening to my situation, he suggested I get a scan first. After the report came back, he explained the problem to me in detail and recommended OAF Repair surgery.

He changed my understanding of sinus. I always thought sinus problems were related to the "nose," and I never thought it could be related to "teeth." I was actually quite surprised at the time, but seeing his professional and meticulous analysis, I chose to trust him. The next day, Dr. Benjie performed the surgery. His professionalism and extensive knowledge greatly boosted my confidence. The entire procedure was much easier than I had imagined; not only was there minimal pain, but his movements were quick, precise, and steady, which made me feel very reassured.

I felt great after the surgery. A few days later, I could clearly feel that the "hollow feeling" had disappeared, and the odor in my nasal cavity had also lessened considerably.

Today, when I went back for my suture removal appointment, the handsome Dr. Benjie told me that my long-standing rhinitis had improved! I was so happy to hear that, and even more grateful that I had chosen to trust Dr. Ryan's judgment and accept the treatment. The changes in just a few days have allowed me to rediscover the comfort and ease of normal breathing.

I am grateful to have met Dr. Ryan and Dr. Benjie. Thank you for their professionalism, patience, and help, which finally allowed me to find the root of the problem and regain the comfortable feeling of breathing. 🙏❤️

Finally, I'd like to share that I actually found Clarity Dental Clinic by chance on Google. To be honest, the price wasn't cheap, but after this treatment, I feel their professionalism, attentiveness, and service were absolutely worth it. Being able to truly identify the problem and resolve years of distress was well worth it for me. ❤️

reviews.text: Bad management and service. Did braces for 2 years and made appointments for every month yet on the actual day, I still have to wait for at least 30minutes and sometimes even up to 90minutes. The dentist was not serious of the entire procedure and even asked me when do I want to remove my braces (am I the patient or dentist now?). Scaling was FOC as it was included in the braces package, however when I removed my braces and the doctor asked if I want to do scaling, I simply said yes. Later on she charged me RM80 as a "favour" where she claimed to mark down the price just for me. (My mother went there for scaling the other day and was charged RM80 too) favour? I think not. The doctor also convinced my parent if I were to do the braces, I would be very satisfied with the results but in the end when I asked about my overbite, the doctor said "this is the best we could do". The dentist who served me is a middle aged Indian women. Highly DO NOT recommend this dental clinic.

reviews.name: Evangeline Ng
reviews.text:
Very disappointing experience with Dr Manesa. I was told my wisdom tooth extraction would be straightforward and did not require an X-ray, but after 2.5 hours the procedure failed and part of the root was left inside. I was in significant pain throughout, and the dentist did not stop or reassess.

The attitude was also unprofessional, and I was even asked “what do you want now?” instead of being properly advised. A filling done during the same visit was also not properly aligned and had to be corrected at a government clinic.

I experienced prolonged bleeding and had to seek immediate treatment elsewhere, where I was prescribed antibiotics and additional medication. I also sent a formal complaint to the clinic but received no response.

It has been almost two weeks and I am still
on antibiotics and painkillers and waiting to undergo surgery once the swelling and inflammation subside. Overall, a very stressful experience. Please consider getting proper assessment and a second opinion before proceeding here.

reviews.name: Chung Jia Yi
reviews.text: If you want to do scaling, find Dr Eugene, he made sure it was pain free and comfortable, very satisfied.

reviews.name: minnin Han
reviews.text:
I am the mother of a 6-year-old child, and we visited Primecare PJ for an emergency appointment with Dr Elaine after my child had an accident that fractured his front tooth. He was in pain, crying loudly, and extremely scared. As a mother, it was very distressing to see him in that state.

My child was very resistant to treatment at first due to fear. However, Dr Elaine and the staff nurse were incredibly patient and calm. They took the time to comfort him, played a kid-friendly cartoon to distract him, and helped him relax. Within moments, the tooth was removed quickly and smoothly. To my surprise, my child immediately stopped crying and said there was no pain at all.

What I appreciated most was Dr Elaine’s care even after the treatment. She explained the aftercare clearly and asked us to come back for a review with an X-ray. Thanks to her gentle and caring approach, my child is no longer afraid of dental appointments and now only wants to see Dr Elaine.

I am writing this review to sincerely thank Dr Elaine, who is now based at the Kepong branch and has replaced the previous doctor in the PJ branch. We are truly grateful for her professionalism, kindness, and excellent care.

reviews.name: Jeremy Wong
reviews.text:
I’ve done scaling, teeth aligners and wisdom tooth extraction here in 2025.

Dr Chew did the scaling and aligners, but she is no longer there. She was really good.

Dr Ding consulted for me and was very kind and knowledgeable. He explained the risks and cost involved.

I had Dr Lai to perform the Minor Oral Surgery to extract my impacted wisdom tooth. Yes, there is an X-ray to be done, but that is to rule out any possibility of nerve damage to the tooth.

Yes it costs money, but they are up front about the cost and I think it’s necessary to do these things. I was worried about nerve damage and post surgery recovery. But it was alright. The nurse Ms Neramala was professional in her conduct and also good with her follow up message and advice.

I recommend this clinic. It’s a private clinic, so it would cost money. But I believe that you get what you pay for. In my case, Dr Lai is experienced, so for major procedures I trust him.
reviews.responseFromOwnerText:
Thank you, Jeremy, for your detailed 5-star review.
At Lai Dental Clinic, we strive to provide the best and most sincere dental care to all our patients.
We will certainly continue to deliver our very best treatment and service.

Regards,
Dr. Lai

reviews.name: Tan Hou
reviews.text:
Went in thinking I had a tooth infection. The doctor couldn’t figure out what was wrong and just sent me for an MRI—felt like a total scam 🤬. The MRI cost RM 350, which is ridiculously expensive. In total, I ended up spending RM 500.
When I was ready to leave, the receptionist was nowhere to be found. After looking around, I found her just playing on her phone 📱. So lazy and unprofessional! I asked to change the name on my bill for insurance purposes, and she flat out said “cannot” with zero helpfulness 🤦‍♂️.
Terrible experience. Don’t waste your time or money here!
reviews.responseFromOwnerText:
Dear Mr. Bong,

Thank you very much for your kind support and for taking the time to share your feedback with us. We truly value every comment, as it helps us improve and also gives us the opportunity to address any concerns clearly.

During your recent visit, a CBCT X-ray (RM350) was taken to help the doctor make a more precise diagnosis regarding the unexplained pain in your lower right tooth. After reviewing and explaining the scan results to you, the doctor proceeded with scaling and polishing (RM150) and observed gum inflammation and recession, which are likely contributing to your tooth sensitivity. You were also advised to use a sensitive toothpaste to help manage this condition.

With regards to the matter of communication, we have looked into it and confirmed that our nurse was attending to patient enquiries via the clinic’s official phone.

As for the receipt and claiming process, kindly note that it is our clinic’s policy to issue receipts strictly under the same name as the identification document provided, in order to maintain compliance and accuracy.

We truly appreciate your understanding and are always here to provide the best possible care for you.

Warm regards,
Dr. Lai
Lai Dental Clinic

reviews.name: Daniel Cheng
reviews.text: Price is very expensive for just filling 2 teeth (RM600). Double the price than my family clinic. First time came here and felt disappointed 😮Most expensive charges ever in my life
reviews.responseFromOwnerText:
Dear Ms. Serena Teo,

First of all, thank you so much for your kind support and for taking the time to share your feedback with us. We truly value every comment and always take them seriously, as they help us improve and also clarify any concerns.

Regarding your recent visit, the two fillings carried out were Class II restorations, each priced at RM300, which follows the standard recommended fee range. To ensure your comfort, local anesthesia was also provided so the treatment could be completed without sensitivity.

The total amount of RM600 includes the 6% SST, which has been implemented by the Malaysian government for foreign patients seeking medical and dental treatments since July 2025.

We hope this clears up any misunderstanding, and please rest assured that we are committed to delivering transparent, comfortable, and high-quality care to all our patients.

Warm regards,
Dr. Lai
Lai Dental Clinic

reviews.name: Erik Teh
reviews.text:
A friend recommended this clinic, because he had good experience. And I'm happy to HIGHLY recommend them as well since I had a FANTASTIC experience in February this year

I had a wisdom tooth extraction

Pre-extraction: Good experience via whatsapp conversation. responsive and helpful

During the visit: The dentist, Dr Julius, has fantastic bed-side manners. Very gentle, friendly and always reassuring throughout.
Even when administering anaesthetics, he kept asking if I feel pain and when I did, he slowed down the anaesthetics so I'd feel less pain. Very commendable!

The actual extraction was very smooth. Again, throughout the whole process, he kept checking if I"m ok. It really helps allay anxiety and fear during the process

Post-extraction: I actually had minimal pain and fast recovery. Was able to take solid food after 1 day!

Dr Julius also made the effort to text me to ask if I was ok post-extraction. Great follow-up

Pricing: Very affordable.

Premise: Comfy and clean! No frills but does the job. Very good experience

Pls do support him. We need good professional affordable dentists like him to be around.

reviews.name: Ehsan Omid
reviews.text: Even after moving to Canada, I still miss the level of care and professionalism I received from Dr. Jason. He always took the time to explain every dental procedure clearly before starting, and that meant a lot to me. I believe helping patients truly understand what's being done is a sign of respect, and Dr. Jason does exactly that. He's skilled, patient, honest, and genuinely cares about his patients' comfort. Finding a dentist like him is not easy, and I highly recommend Ara Dental Studio to anyone looking for exceptional dental care.

reviews.name: Andrea Sim
reviews.text: I did my first ever extraction with Dr Jason, and even though it was an impacted wisdom tooth extraction that is considered a minor surgery, Dr Jason made it as smooth and manageable as possible. Thanks to his patient and thorough explanations about each step of the extraction, I could face it without fear, and thanks to his experience and expertise, the extraction was over in just 30 mins. Thank you so much!

reviews.name: Sollehan Shafura Zainuddin
reviews.text: the best dentist.

reviews.name: Grace Lee
reviews.text:
Highly recommended dental studio!

Dr. Jason is so good in handling kids, he even manage to make my son laughed, as he was feeling tense. He explained everything thoroughly and with great care.

Few days leading to the dental visit, we did prepared and showed him some videos and explained the sounds that he is going to hear, assuring him that it’s just sounds, no pain at all.

Oh! It was nothing like that! The online videos are too scary!

Dr. Jason scrapped out the cavity and managed to clean it with just minimal sound (way softer than your electric toothbrush sound). The whole thing was so quick and my son managed to cooperate throughout.

So, go to Dr. Jason! I imagined all the worst case scenario but Dr. Jason and my son, both proved me wrong! My son was so ready to open his mouth wide and big before the dentist ask to. Dr. Jason surely has a funny bone. Fand for reference, my brave boy is turning 4 soon.

reviews.name: Pang Philip
reviews.text:
Best dentists in town!
Big shout out to both Dr Yong and Dr Jason.
Known Dr Yong for many years. Very knowledgeable, meticulous, and gentle with her hands.
Just had a moderate complexity minor oral surgery to remove my wisdom tooth with Dr Jason yesterday and I was gobbling down rice with Korean chicken today!
Dr Jason was marvellous, thorough review, took time to explain and answer any queries. The procedures were quick, and skill-fully performed.
Most importantly, it wasn’t painful; even when he was injecting the LA!
Thanks!

ownerUpdates.text:
😬 自己的牙齿看起来黄黄的，别人的都白白的？
每天都刷牙，也买了美白牙膏，还是没用。

🔬 牙齿从里面变黄的3个原因 :

✅药物影响
8岁以下吃过 Tetracycline（一种抗生素），或者妈妈怀孕时吃过，这种药会跟还在发育中的牙齿里的钙结合在一起。结果就是——灰色、棕色或黄色的纹路，永远都不会消失。

✅氟斑牙
牙齿还在牙龈里发育的时候，接触到太多氟化物。会造成白色或棕色的斑点。

✅外伤
小时候撞到牙齿，可能伤到里面的神经——牙齿慢慢变灰，即使一开始看起来完全没事。

❓ 为什么药物💊会让牙齿变黄？
Tetracycline 对钙离子有很强的吸附力。一旦进入身体，它就会到处去找钙结合——包括还在发育中的牙齿。
它是直接嵌进牙齿结构里面的。不是表面的污渍，而是已经变成牙齿的一部分了。
最高风险的时期：怀孕中期一直到孩子12岁。

👨🏻‍⚕️ 今天正常营业 9am-9pm🌙 😊

Dental Clinic open as usual today

🎉 终于拆牙箍了，开心还没多久，结果发现牙齿上有白色斑点？

"拆完牙箍变成这样，正常吗🤔？"

🔬 这到底是怎么回事
那些白色斑点叫做白斑病变(white spot lesion)，意思是牙釉质因为矿物质流失而开始有早期损伤了。

戴牙箍的时候，bracket 周围的位置很难刷干净。牙菌膜慢慢堆积，细菌产生酸，酸把牙釉质里的矿物质溶解掉。结果就变成那种粉笔状、暗暗的白色斑点。

😟 两个不同阶段
第一阶段——牙釉质矿物质流失，但还没变成蛀牙。还可以治疗补救。

第二阶段——已经形成早期蛀洞了。表面变粗糙，有小小的孔洞。需要更密集的治疗。

🛠️ 三个治疗方案
✅ 氟化物涂层或者 CPP-ACP——帮助矿物质重新沉积回牙釉质里。适合早期的情况。
✅ 微研磨——轻轻磨掉一层薄薄的表面，减少斑点的明显程度。适合中等程度的情况。
✅ 树脂渗透——让树脂渗入牙釉质，把斑点遮盖掉，不需要磨掉表层。对情况已经稳定的病例来说是最好的选择。

🔬 2026年马来西亚私人诊所4种牙冠类型和价格

金属牙冠 — RM700 至 RM1,300
四种里面最强的，可以用 20 到 30 年。颜色是灰色金属色——最适合最里面的大臼齿，笑起来完全看不到的那种。

PFM牙冠 — RM900 至 RM1,500
外面是白色瓷，里面有金属框架。时间久了，牙龈往下退的时候牙龈边缘会开始出现一条黑线。以前很流行——现在已经慢慢被取代了。

氧化锆牙冠 — RM1,200 至 RM2,500
目前马来西亚最受欢迎的选择。完全没有金属，够强，颜色自然。2025年的研究显示5年存活率高达98%。前牙后牙都适合。

全瓷牙冠 — RM1,500 至 RM3,000
外观最自然最好看。最适合笑起来会露出来的前牙。承受咬合压力方面比氧化锆稍弱，不太适合后牙。

🏆 2026年最受欢迎的选择
氧化锆完全主导市场——全球81%的牙冠现在都用氧化锆做，PFM只剩7%了。马来西亚也是同样的趋势。

为什么？够强、好看、没有金属。

❓假牙、牙冠、还是种植牙——哪个咬苹果🍎最有力？🤔

这三种的咬合力差别很大。这个差别直接决定了你做完治疗之后的生活质量。

🏆 种植牙咬合力最强 💪

假牙——只放在牙龈上面
没有牙根，没有连接到骨头。咬合力是最弱的😣——大概只有 50 牛顿左右。每次咬硬的东西，假牙都会稍微移动。

牙冠——套在原本的牙齿上面
咬合力取决于下面那颗牙的健康状况。如果牙齿或牙根已经弱了，或者骨头已经萎缩，咬合力也会跟着受限。

种植牙——直接把钛金属柱种进骨头里
用的是钛合金材料，会通过骨整合和下颌骨融为一体。咬合力直接传到骨头——可以达到将近 150 牛顿，非常接近天然牙齿的 200 牛顿。

😟 戴假牙的患者常常说：
"不敢吃肉，怕假牙移位。"

换成种植牙——牛排🍖、鱿鱼、苹果🍎——全部都可以吃。因为咬合力几乎和真牙一样。

🧠 医生通常没有解释清楚的事——这个咬合力的差距不只是舒不舒服的问题。它决定了你接下来是可以自由地想吃什么就吃什么，还是一辈子都要挑着吃。

🤔 知道不能，但为什么❓

背后的科学原理到底是什么
来，让医生解释一下

如果你真的了解拔牙后那个洞里发生了什么，你在头 48 小时内根本不会敢碰吸管

拔牙之后，血小板会在 15 到 30 分钟内在洞里形成血块

那个血块不只是普通的凝固血液

它是一个活的支架，是新组织生长和从里面慢慢封闭伤口的基础结构

当你用吸管吸东西，嘴巴里会产生负压

那个压力足够在一口吸的瞬间把血块直接拉出来

血块一旦脱落，骨头和神经就直接暴露在空气和细菌面前

这个情况叫做干槽症

痛的来源是暴露在外的骨头神经，不是普通的伤口痛

即使吃了止痛药，也可能持续痛 3 到 5 天

很多人不知道的是——干槽症不会自己好

必须回诊所让医生清洁伤口并放入特殊敷料，愈合过程才能重新开始

医生通常没解释清楚的事——用吸管看起来只是轻轻一吸，但产生的负压原理跟真空吸力是一样的

拔牙后头 48 小时，那个洞根本没有足够的力量抵抗这个压力

拔牙后的「四个NO🚫」
很多人以为没关系，结果痛到后悔 😔

❌ 第一个NO：不要能用吸管

很多人以为用吸管喝东西比较安全，因为不用直接碰到伤口。
其实刚好相反。
用吸管吸的那一刻，嘴巴里产生的负压会直接把血块吸走。
血块一旦脱落，骨头和神经就直接暴露了。
不管喝什么——水、果汁、奶茶——拔牙后 72 小时内，放下吸管。

---

❌ 第二个NO：不要漱口

拔完牙当天很多人第一个反应就是想漱口，感觉嘴巴里有血腥味很不舒服。
但用力漱口产生的水流冲击力，足够把还没稳固的血块直接冲走。
如果真的很想清洁口腔，可以轻轻用盐水含着然后让它自己流出来，不要用力漱。
漱口水、Listerine 也先暂时放一边，至少等 24 小时后再说。

---

❌ 第三个NO：不要抽烟

这个是干槽症最常见的原因之一。
抽烟有双重伤害——
第一，吸烟的动作跟用吸管一样，嘴巴产生负压，血块容易脱落。
第二，烟里面的化学物质会干扰血液凝固，让伤口更难愈合。
研究显示，抽烟的人得干槽症的概率比不抽烟的人高出将近三倍。
拔牙后至少 72 小时，能忍就忍。

---

❌ 第四个NO：不要用舌头去戳那个洞

说真的，这个几乎每个人都会做 😅
洞在那里，舌头自然就想去探一下，感觉很奇怪很想确认一下。
但每次舌头碰到那个洞，都是在干扰血块形成的过程。
血块很脆弱，尤其是头 24 到 48 小时。
一直戳，一直干扰，愈合就一直被推迟。
脑袋知道不该碰，但舌头不听话——这个真的要靠意识去控制。

---

⚠️ 总结一句话

拔牙后的痛不痛，很大程度上不是看医生技术好不好，而是看你回家之后有没有好好保护那个血块。

血块在，愈合顺利。
血块没了，干槽症来了，那种痛才是真的让你后悔 😔

🦷
Our Dental clinic in Petaling Jaya open as usual today (Agong's Birthday) to serve the community of Seapark Taman Paramount 🏡.

❓上一次拔牙完全不痛，麻药退了之后最多吃两颗止痛药就没事了

但是……
第二次找同一个医生拔牙
这次却痛到晚上还在跳

这个医生是不是退步了😣？

其实答案在你自己身体里，

四个4️⃣ 决定拔牙后疼痛程度的原因：

1) 拔牙时牙齿的状况
有活跃性感染的牙齿，拔完之后会比较痛
感染会改变周围组织的酸碱值，让麻药更难完全封住神经，发炎的组织在愈合过程中也会更敏感

2) 拔牙的难度
拔一颗已经松动的牙跟拔一颗牙根分叉或者在骨头里转弯的牙完全不一样
处理得越久，组织受到创伤的时间就越长

3) Dry socket（干槽症）
本来应该盖住拔牙洞的血块提早脱落了
骨头直接暴露在外，神经被空气和压力直接刺激
所以有时候第二天或第三天反而比第一天更痛

4) 你拔完之后做了什么（上次不痛，这次会不会就没那么认真跟着医生的指示做？）
用吸管喝东西、用力漱口、吃热的东西、抽烟
这些都会把血块冲掉，让已经开始愈合的地方重新暴露

🦷

❓谁的牙冠的牙龈边缘有一条"黑线"，或者看起来好像裂掉了？

很多人不知道，PFM 牙冠（就是以前最常用的那种）其实有两个缺点，很多人装了之后才发现，而且医生当初可能没有解释清楚

1️⃣ 第一个缺点——外层白色瓷面可能会裂，露出里面的灰色金属

牙冠表面那层看起来像牙齿颜色的瓷，如果你咬到硬的东西就可能裂开或崩掉，比如：
冰块、鸡骨头、硬饼干、坚果

瓷一旦裂了，里面的灰色金属框架就会直接暴露出来
昨天还是白色的牙，明天可能就变成一半灰色金属色了

2️⃣ 第二个缺点——牙龈往下退的时候，金属边缘线就会开始露出来

随着年纪大了👴🏻👵🏻，牙龈慢慢往下退，原本藏在牙龈下面的金属边缘就会慢慢浮出来

⚠️ 牙龈边那条黑线不是牙结石，不是牙齿变黑，那是 PFM 牙冠的金属框架露出来了
这个过程是慢慢来的，要好几年
很多人都是被别人提醒，或者自己看照片才发现

医生通常没有主动解释的事——

这两个问题都不是"坏掉了"，而是 PFM 牙冠本身的特性，它在美观方面是有使用年限的

Kindly arrange your appointments before the holiday if needed we are happy to assist you in advance.

Thank you for your continued trust and support. We look forward to seeing you again soon. 💙

Happy Labour Day! 🌼

Today, we honour the dedication, resilience, and hard work of every individual who keeps things moving forward. Your efforts truly make a difference. Thank you for your commitment, passion, and the care you bring to what you do each day.

BioSmile Dental Clinic wishes you a meaningful Labour Day filled with rest, appreciation, and well-deserved joy. 💛

🌙✨ Raya Break Notice from BioSmile Dental Clinic! ✨🌙

In conjunction with Hari Raya celebrations, BioSmile Dental Clinic will be closed on 21–22 March.

We wish all our wonderful patients a Selamat Hari Raya Aidilfitri! May your celebrations be filled with joy, laughter, and plenty of sweet smiles. 😄🌙

We will be back to serve you after the holiday. For appointments, kindly drop us a message before the closure to reserve your slot!

Thank you for your continuous support and trust in us to care for your smile. 🦷✨

"Putting A Smile On You!"

Restoring Smiles Gently 🤍

In Chinese culture, a small gap between the front teeth is often believed to symbolize money flowing away. As Chinese New Year approaches, many choose to “seal” that luck by closing the gap and welcoming prosperity with a complete, confident smile.

A gap in the front teeth may seem like a minor detail, but it can greatly affect how a smile looks and feels. With a gentle and precise touch, the space is carefully restored and shaped to blend naturally with your existing tooth — creating a smooth, seamless, and confident smile. ✨🦷

It’s amazing how something so simple can brighten not just your smile, but also how you feel each day. Little details truly matter, and sometimes the smallest changes create the brightest smiles.

Experience your own gentle smile transformation at BIOSMILE DENTAL CLINIC — and see the difference for yourself.

🌙 With Sincere Wishes This Ramadhan 🌙

As we welcome this blessed month, may it bring peace, mercy, and abundant blessings to you and your loved ones. May this meaningful time be filled with reflection, gratitude, and good health.

BioSmile Dental Clinic would like to express our heartfelt appreciation to all our valued patients for your continued trust and support. It is always our privilege to care for your smiles.

Wishing you a peaceful and blessed Ramadhan. 🌙✨

BioSmile Dental Clinic wishes you a year filled with good health, happiness, and prosperity. As we welcome the Lunar New Year, we sincerely thank you for your continued trust and support in allowing us to care for your smiles.

Please be informed that our clinic will be closed from 17th to 19th February 2026 in celebration of Chinese New Year.

We will resume operations on 20th February 2026 (Friday), 9:00 AM – 5:00 PM, and look forward to serving you again.

Wishing you and your loved ones a joyful, blessed, and prosperous festive season. 🧧✨

"Putting A Smile On You!"

Dreaming of a straighter smile without the discomfort of traditional braces?

Damon Braces use an advanced self-ligating system that reduces friction, making treatment more comfortable and potentially faster while giving you beautiful, natural results.

From your first consultation to your smile transformation, our experienced dental team is here to guide you every step of the way 🦷💙

updatesFromCustomers.text: iSmile Dental Clinic @ Damansara Jaya

ownerUpdates.text:
Missing some or all of your teeth? Dentures are a well-established way to restore function and appearance.

What Are Dentures?
They're removable replacements for missing teeth. Usually two types:
- Partial dentures — when some natural teeth remain
- Full dentures — when all teeth are missing in an arch

Both are custom-made to fit your mouth comfortably.

What to Expect
Getting dentures takes a few visits:
- Your dentist checks your mouth and talks through your needs
- Impressions and measurements are taken
- The dentures are custom-made to fit
- Small adjustments may be needed for comfort

It can take a bit of getting used to when eating and speaking, but most people settle in well.

Your dentist will guide you through it and help you decide what's right for your situation.

Call +6016-322 2135 or WhatsApp to book a consultation.

A restricted tongue might affect more than you'd think — feeding, speech, breathing, even jaw development.

What Is Tongue Tie?
It's when the piece of tissue under the tongue is too tight, limiting movement.

Signs worth checking:
- Trouble lifting the tongue upward
- Difficulty moving it side to side
- A heart-shaped tip when the tongue sticks out
- Breastfeeding challenges in babies
- Speech difficulties in kids
- Mouth breathing or poor sleep

How We Assess
At iSmile, we look at tongue function as part of our broader approach. Your dentist can check range of motion and talk about whether a tie might be contributing to any symptoms.

We can also connect you with the right specialist if further support is needed.

Not sure if it's relevant? A dental visit is a sensible starting point.

Call +6016-322 2135 or WhatsApp to book an appointment.

Got a chipped, cracked, or stained tooth? Dental bonding could be a quick fix.

What Is It?
Your dentist applies a tooth-coloured resin to the tooth, shapes it, hardens it with a special light, and polishes it so it blends in.

Common uses:
- Small chips or cracks
- Stubborn stains
- Closing small gaps
- Making a tooth look more even

What to Expect
Bonding is usually a one-visit thing. No anaesthetic needed unless it's filling a cavity. Your dentist preps the surface, applies the resin, and sculpts it to shape.

How Long Does It Hold Up?
Bonding is durable but not as tough as natural enamel. It can last a few years with normal care. Your dentist can give you a better sense based on your situation.

Call +6016-322 2135 or WhatsApp to find out more.

Angel Aligner is another clear aligner option available at iSmile — worth knowing about if you're exploring your options.

What Is It?
Like other clear aligner systems, Angel Aligner uses custom-made clear trays to straighten your teeth gradually. They're removable, so eating and cleaning are hassle-free.

Who Might Consider It
Angel Aligner can work well for many adults and teens with mild to moderate alignment needs. Your dentist can check if you're a candidate.

How It Works
- Your dentist examines your teeth and takes digital scans
- A treatment plan is made with custom aligners
- You wear each set for a period, then move to the next
- Your dentist tracks your progress along the way

Angel Aligner is available alongside Invisalign at iSmile. Your dentist can help you decide which system suits you best.

Call +6016-322 2135 or WhatsApp to book a consultation.

Breathing through your mouth might not seem like a big deal, but it can have more of an impact than people realise.

What Happens When You Mouth Breathe
Breathing through your mouth instead of your nose, especially during sleep, can affect things over time. Your dentist may pick up on signs like:
- Dry mouth in the morning
- More plaque than usual
- Irritated gums
- Persistent bad breath

Mouth breathing can also affect how well you sleep, which ties into your overall wellbeing.

What to Do About It
First step is noticing the habit. Your dentist can check for signs during a routine visit and talk about what might be behind it. Sometimes it's related to nasal congestion, jaw position, or habits formed over time.

If it's something you'd like to explore, a dental check-up is a sensible place to start.

Call +6016-322 2135 or WhatsApp to book an appointment.

Did you know your dentist can screen for signs of sleep-related breathing issues?

The Connection
Your mouth and airway are closely linked. Things like jaw structure, tongue posture, and how you breathe can affect sleep quality.

During a routine check-up, your dentist might notice signs worth exploring — teeth grinding, a scalloped tongue, or certain jaw patterns.

What to Look Out For
Signs that might be worth bringing up:
- Loud or regular snoring
- Gasping or choking during sleep
- Waking up feeling tired
- Daytime drowsiness
- Grinding your teeth
- Mouth breathing while asleep

What We Do
Screening for airway and sleep concerns is part of our approach at iSmile. If something comes up, your dentist can talk it through with you and, if needed, suggest a referral for further assessment.

A screening is a helpful first step — not a replacement for a full medical sleep study or diagnosis.

Call +6016-322 2135 or WhatsApp to find out more.

Want to improve your smile? Veneers could be something to look into.

What Are Veneers?
They're thin, tooth-coloured shells that bond to the front of your teeth. Great for stains, chips, gaps, or teeth that are a bit out of shape.

How It Works
- Your dentist checks your teeth and talks about what you'd like to change
- A thin layer of enamel may be gently removed from the tooth surface
- Impressions are taken for custom veneers
- The veneers are bonded to your teeth on the next visit

What to Keep in Mind
Veneers can make a real difference to your smile, but they're not right for everyone. Your dentist can take a look and let you know if veneers suit you or if another option might be better.

Care is pretty straightforward — just brush and floss like usual.

Call +6016-322 2135 or WhatsApp to book a consultation.

Thinking about straightening your teeth? Invisalign might be worth a look.

What Is Invisalign?
It's a system that uses clear, removable aligners to gradually straighten your teeth. No brackets or wires — just custom-made trays that fit over your teeth.

How It Works
- Your dentist checks if Invisalign is a good fit for you
- Custom aligners are made based on your treatment plan
- You wear each set for a period, then move to the next
- Aligners come out for eating, brushing, and flossing
- Your dentist checks your progress along the way

Is It Right for You?
Invisalign works well for plenty of adults and teens who want a more discreet way to straighten their teeth. But the best way to know is to have your dentist take a look and talk through your options.

They can explain how Invisalign compares with other choices based on your situation.

Call +6016-322 2135 or WhatsApp to book a consultation.

Questions to Ask Before Orthodontic Treatment

Thinking about braces or aligners for yourself or your child? A consultation is a good time to understand the options clearly.

Helpful questions:
- What concern are we trying to correct?
- Which options may suit my teeth, age, and routine?
- How long might treatment take?
- How often are review visits needed?
- What should I know about cleaning and retainers?

The dentist can explain what is suitable after checking your teeth, bite, and oral health. To plan an orthodontic assessment with iSmile Dental Clinic in Damansara Jaya, WhatsApp or call the clinic.

Got a damaged tooth or a gap to fill? Crowns and bridges are tried and tested options.

What's a Crown?
Think of it like a cap that sits over a damaged tooth. It's used when a tooth is cracked, weakened, or just too worn down for a filling. The crown covers the whole visible part and protects what's underneath.

What's a Bridge?
A bridge fills the space where a tooth is missing. It uses the teeth on either side as anchors, with a false tooth in the middle. If implants aren't right for you, a bridge can be a good alternative.

What Happens
- Your dentist checks the area and talks through your options
- The tooth gets reshaped slightly to make room
- Impressions are taken so everything fits well
- A temporary crown or bridge goes on while the permanent one is being made
- On your next visit, the permanent one is fitted and adjusted

Your dentist will recommend what makes the most sense for you.

Call +6016-322 2135 or WhatsApp to book a consultation.

ownerUpdates.text:
🦷 For Anyone Who Feels Nervous About Seeing the Dentist 💙

If your heart beats a little faster the moment you hear the word “dentist”, you’re not alone — and you’re not “weak” for feeling that way.

Dental anxiety is very real. For many people, it comes from a past painful experience, fear of the unknown, or simply feeling out of control in the chair.

At Circle Dental Clinic, we understand this deeply.

That’s why we take things slow, explain everything before we start, and check in with you throughout your visit. No rushing. No surprises. And absolutely no judgment.

Most of our anxious patients tell us the same thing after their appointment:
🗣 “I wish I came sooner.”

If you’ve been putting off dental care because of fear, let this be your sign — you’re in safe, gentle hands. We’ll go at your pace, one step at a time. 

📍Taman Megah, Petaling Jaya
📲 WhatsApp us at 010-9533717 to book or ask questions

You’re always welcome here.

reviews.name: Kayzo chiang
reviews.text:
第一次来这间牙科，里面的工作人员都非常友好、有效率，也很有活力，整体看诊体验不错

不过楼下的销售摊位让我感到不舒服
对方在我尚未决定购买前，就直接开单并把商品递给我要求付款，推销方式相当有压力
后来我查询一样的产品，价格也明显更低

此外，我也看到销售人员持续向一位老妇人推销，即使对方表示没有预算，仍不断劝购，让人观感不佳

希望院方能留意楼下销售活动的管理，以免影响整体良好的医疗体验。
reviews.textTranslated:
This was my first time at this dental clinic, and the staff were all very friendly, efficient, and energetic, making for a good overall experience.

However, the sales booths downstairs made me uncomfortable. Before I even decided to buy anything, they immediately wrote out a receipt, handed me the product, and demanded payment—a very pushy sales tactic.

Later, I checked the same products and found them to be significantly cheaper.

Furthermore, I saw a salesperson persistently trying to sell to an elderly woman, even after she said she had no budget, which left a bad impression.

I hope the clinic will pay attention to managing the sales activities downstairs to avoid impacting the overall positive medical experience.

I cannot recommend Dr. Mira enough! I have been on my journey with Self-Ligating Braces with her since 2024. After a 7-month hiatus in 2025, I am so relieved to be restarting my treatment in 2026 at Dr. Mira’s brand-new clinic.

She is truly one of the softest, kindest and most talented professionals I’ve ever met. Her workmanship is absolutely meticulous and she takes the time to address every single concern with patience and expertise.

Congratulations on the opening of your new clinic, Dr. Mira!

People are going to love the care here. If you have any issues with your teeth, do not hesitate to come here you are in the best hands and there is truly nothing to worry about :)

reviews.name: Dharma Dev Rajh
reviews.text:
I had a really great experience with this dental clinic. The dentist was very professional, gentle, and took the time to explain the entire scaling and polishing process, which made me feel comfortable and at ease.

The procedure itself was smooth and not painful at all. I could really feel the difference afterward—my teeth felt much cleaner, fresher, and looked noticeably brighter.

The clinic environment was clean and well-maintained, and the staff were friendly and welcoming. Overall, I’m very satisfied with the service and would definitely recommend this dentist to anyone looking for quality dental care.

reviews.name: UMA DEVI UP NAIR
reviews.text:
I went to Dental Regalia yesterday, and I had a really wonderful experience. The service was excellent, and all the nurses were very caring and professional. During my tooth check-up, I suddenly felt cold, and one of the nurses quickly brought me a blanket to make sure I was comfortable. That thoughtful gesture meant a lot to me.
The two Malay girl nurses were absolutely super duper amazing, even though I didn’t get their names. They were kind, attentive, and made me feel very comfortable throughout my visit.
Doctor Ken Louis also gave me a very clear explanation about my tooth before the extraction procedure. I was quite nervous at first, but everything went smoothly. There was no pain at all during the injection because he used an anesthetic gel before giving the injection.
Overall, my journey at this dental clinic was truly good and comfortable. I highly recommend Dental Regalia to anyone looking for professional and caring dental service.

reviews.text:
Super recommend this clinic! The doctor and staff are so kind, gentle, and caring. One night, when my husband’s tooth pain was really bad, I messaged them even though the clinic was closed. I know I shouldn’t kacau, but it was an emergency, and I was so worried. Thank God they replied and guided us patiently. 🙏

First consultation for gusi bengkak was only RM50, and tooth extraction RM150. The price is reasonable, but what I appreciate most is their genuine care and excellent service.✨They even checked in after treatment to see how my husband was doing.

If you’ve been putting off a dental visit, give Whale Smile a try. You’ll feel at ease from the moment you walk in, and your dental care will be in good hands. 🌊🦷🐳🐋✨
reviews.responseFromOwnerText: Thank you Ms Aira for your kind and detailed review! We are glad to be of help as we understand toothaches can cause a lot of discomfort 😣 We are happy to hear from you and thank you again for sharing your positive experience with our dental team! 🐳

reviews.responseFromOwnerText:
Hi Yaya, thank you for taking the time to share your feedback. We’re sorry to hear that your experience did not meet your expectations.

We take concerns regarding treatment quality and patient experience seriously, and we appreciate you bringing this to our attention. Scaling results can sometimes vary depending on the amount and condition of the deposits present, but we understand your disappointment and would like the opportunity to review your visit properly.

We also apologise if you felt rushed or uncomfortable during your appointment. Patient comfort and quality care are important to us, and your comments will be shared with our team for improvement.

Please feel free to contact us directly so we can better understand your concerns and see how we may assist further. Thank you again for your honest feedback.

reviews.name: Laura Kang
reviews.text:
Went at 4pm, receptionist said dentist went home (even though they close at 6pm) because no appointments made.

Next day, I tried calling at 1pm many times, but no answer. I work just upstairs, so I walked over to see the dentist/make an appointment but they apparently close until 2pm for lunch.

Receptionist was there eating her lunch nicely at her desk, but refused to open the door for me to even make an appointment for later. I had to speak to her through the locked glass door. ?????

Then I said I want to make an appointment for 4pm later the same day. She said cannot cause dentist will go home by that time. But their operating hours are until 6pm. ?????

So even if I tried to make an appointment prior to my visit, it wouldn’t matter because they go home early before 4pm even though their hours state until 6pm???????

reviews.text:
Came here randomly for scaling after seeing it online and had a fantastic experience with Dr. Ashvin.

The dentist was extremely thorough during consultation, and was patient in answering my questions.

During the scaling process, his assistant and him were gentle in their approach and often checked in to see if I was uncomfortable, really appreciated that.

Surprisingly, the scaling package here comes with polishing as well, which was something I'd never gotten in my other private dental clinics, so was quite surprised.

Charged RM150 for scaling and RM30 for consultation; would definitely recommend this place if you're looking for a dental clinic that's extremely comfortable and with pleasant staff.

ownerUpdates.text:
Dental Appointment - keep it or postpone it!
😬 Sound familiar?
You made the appointment. You’re literally standing outside. And still… that little voice says “maybe next time.”
We see you. 👀
At Tropicana Dental Surgery we get it — walking through the door is sometimes the hardest part. That’s why we work hard to make every visit feel easy, comfortable, and judgment-free.
No tricks. No surprises. Just great care from a team that actually wants to see you (and your smile).
Our dentist is very passionate about making your visit a pleasant experience.  He helps take the fear away first before he starts any treatment at all. Don’t take our word for it - check out the reviews! 

📅 We are open for appointments  as usual and — walk-ins are questionable and can be tricky.  Check with us in advance 
📍 or book online today.

Don’t let the little fearful voice win. Your teeth will thank you.

Choosing a dentist is not only about who is nearest, cheapest, or most convenient.

Of course cost, timing, parking, and the dentist’s experience matter. They should.

But there is another question that matters just as much: do you feel safe and comfortable enough with that dentist to talk openly? Someone you feel comfortable with and can trust, even on the first visit. This is so important for a good dental experience.

At Tropicana Dental Surgery, we believe many patients delay dental treatment. This is not always just because of fear of pain. Pain may be part of it, but often there are other concerns on the patient’s mind.

Sometimes they delay because they feel uneasy, rushed, embarrassed, uncertain about cost, or not fully understood.

A quick price check online, or shopping around with a short phone call, rarely tells you enough. Checking Google reviews is also a good idea. But those reviews reflect other patients’ experiences. What really matters is whether the clinic feels right for you.
You need to feel comfortable asking questions, discussing options, and understanding what is right for you.

This is part of what we call the Safe Chair Protocol: creating a space where patients feel heard, respected, and able to make decisions with clarity.
When choosing a dentist, do not look only at convenience. 

Look also at whether you feel safe in the chair, and whether the clinic feels right for you on a personal level.

Avoiding the Dentist? 
Let’s Be Honest!  You know you are due for a visit but somehow just cannot get down to visiting the dentist. Don't worry most people are like you.  

Is this you? 

Yes, it has been more than 6 months. You know you should book an appointment, but you keep putting it off. You tell yourself you are "too busy."

But is that really it? Or is it something deeper?

Check out this list. Do any of these feelings hit home for you?

1. "It’s going to hurt."
You are terrified of the **pain** or the needle. The fear  is real.
2. "My teeth are really bad.**
You feel embarrassed. You worry the dentist will judge you or lecture you about your oral health.
3."I feel helpless.
You hate lying in that chair, mouth open, with no control over what is happening.
4. "I had a nightmare experience before."
Maybe a dentist hurt you years ago, and you haven't forgotten.

Does this sound like you?

If yes, please know: It is not your fault. These are normal human reactions.

At Tropicana Dental Surgery we don't just fix teeth; we rebuild trust. Whether you need complex work like dental implants, or you are finally ready for dental braces or clear aligners, we start with kindness, not judgment.

Don't let fear decide your future. Let's just have a chat first.

📞 **Call us when you are ready.**
📍 **Tropicana Dental Surgery**

Is that "small" toothache trying to tell you something? 🦷
Many patients tell us they "hoped the pain would go away." But in dentistry, waiting usually turns a small problem into a bigger one.

When you delay fixing a cavity or a cracked tooth, the bacteria go deeper. Once they reach the nerve (the pulp), a simple filling is no longer an option—you will likely need a Root Canal Treatment (RCT) to save the tooth.

Watch out for these signs 
• Persistent toothache or sensitivity to hot/cold.
• Pain when biting down.
• Swelling near the gums.

Don't wait until it keeps you up at night. Catching it early saves your natural tooth and saves you time!
📍 Visit us at Tropicana Dental Surgery. Let’s check it before it gets deep and serious.  And don’t worry we are specialist in managing patients who are scared and have dental fear at the dentist.

Needless to say the surgery went well, he was very gentle and all my fears went away.  He made it seem so easy. And now just 2 days after no need to take painkillers. reviews.name: Monicelson
reviews.text:
I visited this Dental Surgery whilst in Kuala Lumpur.
I needed a check on fillings I recently had done in Bali, and for discussion on having bridges.
Dr Mahendran Ponnudurai (he is the president of the Malaysian Dental Association) is the first dentist who clearly explained everything that needed to be done, why it was necessary (this was explained with various models of teeth, pictures and x-rays) and what could happen if  I left my teeth in their current condition.
His explanation was clear, succinct, factual and humorous. He could clearly see that I was fearful of Dental treatment, but his manner, knowledge and professionalism calmed me.
His two Dental nurses were also excellent, in my opinion this is a superb team.
I had two extractions, a root canal, treatment for an abscess, two permanent bridges fitted and two temporary bridges.
I will return to Malaysia in June for the temporary bridges removal and the fitting of 2 permanent bridges.
I am incredibly happy with the work Dr Mahendran has done so far (I am finally able to chew properly again), I can fully and confidently recommend him (especially for people like myself who have a fear of dentists).
His surgery is open from early till late six days a week.
Thank you for your time and Patience Dr Mahendran, it was a pleasure getting to know you.
A quick update to my original review.
It is now May 2025 and I am back in Malaysia. I visited Dr Mahendran again,  this time I needed caps as some of my teeth had some serious cracks.
The service I received was every bit as good as my first visit.
He knows my pain tolerance is low, so made sure I did not feel any pain, even numbing the injection site with cream, before giving me the injection.
He prepared the teeth, took a mould and put a cover on the teeth.
Once my new caps arrived, he numbed the site before removing the cover.
New caps were fitted quickly and securely, without pain.
He checks his work every couple of days and makes subtle adjustments if and where needed.
I find Dr Mahendran to be a genuinely nice and professional man. His sense of humour always makes the trip pleasant and the work is excellent.
If you're worried about your teeth, this is where you should come to.
